stereotype: «Engine» — pure, deterministic; encapsulates ConstructionEstimationModel volatility (construction-side); Strategy host; imports no Temporal
volatility: ConstructionEstimationModel (construction-side) — how construction duration, cost, and risk are computed for one project option. Evolves as workers change, historical build data accumulates, and the team refines the model (5-day quanta → cone-of-uncertainty intervals; arithmetic risk → geometric variants).

ops.stereotype: pure compute — plain deterministic Go function; no Activity wrapper; no Temporal
ops.note: Returns mutually-consistent {duration, buildCost, risk} for one project option from one CPM pass over its activity network.

fields.name: Option
fields.note: ProjectOption struct { OptionID OptionID; Network ActivityNetwork; WorkerMix WorkerMix; CalendarDaysPerWeek float64 }

fields.name: Duration
fields.note: CPM critical-path length at the option's worker mix; Duration struct { SimDays float64 }

fields.name: BuildCost
fields.note: Σ activity effort person-days × worker-class build rate + indirect loading; Money struct { MinorUnits int64; Currency string }

fields.name: Risk
fields.note: composite construction risk; RiskScore struct { Composite float64; CriticalityRisk float64; ActivityRisk float64 }

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ContractMisuse (nil/invalid option) | InternalInvariant (CPM or risk invariant violated); no retryable flag; all programmer errors

dataContracts: ProjectOption struct { OptionID, Network ActivityNetwork, WorkerMix, CalendarDaysPerWeek float64 /+ option-shaping fields/ }
ActivityNode struct { ActivityID, EffortDays float64, WorkerClass, RiskBucket }
ConstructionEstimate struct { Duration, BuildCost Money, Risk RiskScore } // three mutually-consistent facets
Duration struct { SimDays float64 } // CPM critical-path length at the option's worker mix
RiskScore struct { Composite float64, CriticalityRisk float64, ActivityRisk float64 } // composite = activity_risk + penalties
Money struct { MinorUnits int64, Currency string } // reuse shared framework-go/settlementEngine type (FU-EE-C)
errorModel: framework-go/engine.Error — ContractMisuse (nil option; empty/structurally-invalid network; negative effort) | InternalInvariant (CPM produced negative critical-path length or risk component outside [0,1]). No InvalidInput (no parse step; typed value inputs). No retryable flag; all errors are programmer errors.
idempotency: Trivially idempotent — pure function; identical option → identical ConstructionEstimate; no side effects; no idempotencyKey.

revisions.summary: New contract for existing Engine whose scope was narrowed back to construction-only (split from OperationEstimationModel); 1-op justified against single-context volatility and DSL edge label; OQ-1..6 drafted.

APPROVE-AND-FREEZE: 6/9 PASS, 2 WAIVED (2a+2b — 1-op endorsed). Zero in-authority amendments. OQ-1 waiver endorsed; OQ-2 CPM homing resolved in-contract (both resolutions pure, no outbound edge); OQ-3 no infrastructureKind pivot confirmed; OQ-4 N-calls shape confirmed; OQ-5 signature+ConstructionEstimate ratified field-shape construction-refinable; OQ-6 shared Money type FU-EE-C. 4 non-blocking follow-ups ratified.
